patch.value: First-party baseline profile package built on public SDK primitives
Provide an installable first-party exemplar package that dogfoods public SDK primitives for a complete project-management archetype/profile.

A first-party baseline/profile package is installable; it uses public SDK APIs only; package catalog/describe/doctor are clean; docs and examples explain the archetype; SDK testing helpers cover registrations; temp-project dogfood installs the package, applies the profile, and creates sample items.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Duplicate check: status-all package/profile searches found closed package platform and exemplar work, while pm package catalog currently has no baseline/profile/archetype package.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: ENABLING PRIMITIVE SHIPPED (in the pm-v37g/pm-bhmk profiles PR): SDK now exports defineProjectProfile (typed identity builder for ProjectProfileDefinition), BUILTIN_PROFILES, PROFILE_NAMES, resolveProfile, listProfiles, normalizeProfileName, and the pure planProfileApplication + ProfileApplicationPlan/ProfileCurrentState types. The three built-in archetypes (agile/ops/research) dogfood the model. REMAINING follow-up scope for this item: build an installable first-party package (e.g. pm-baseline-profile) that defines a profile via defineProjectProfile AND make it applicable from a package. Gap: profile apply orchestration (lock/write/hooks/templates) lives in cli/commands/profile.ts and is NOT yet SDK-exported, and `pm profile apply` only resolves BUILTIN_PROFILES — there is no external-profile registration path yet. So pm-a7o4 needs either (a) an SDK applyProfile orchestration export + an extension capability to register profiles into the `pm profile` resolver, or (b) the package ships a thin command that calls planProfileApplication + writes. Keep open, blocked-by pm-v37g (now satisfied for the primitive half).

patch.value:
## Implementation plan (claude-code-agent, 2026-06-25)

**Deliverable:** new first-party package `packages/pm-kanban` — an installable exemplar that ships a complete **Kanban continuous-flow archetype/profile** built on public SDK primitives only. Closes the last open child of epic pm-ugqx.

**Why a new archetype (not re-export of agile/ops/research):** a redistributable 4th archetype proves the "ship a complete project-management archetype as a pm package" pattern end-to-end, distinct from the three core-baked profiles. Kanban (flow/WIP) is broadly useful and complements the sprint-based `agile` profile.

**Authoring pattern (decided after recon):** mirror `pm-command-kit` (single `index.ts`, `import type` only from `@unbrained/pm-cli/sdk`, synchronous hand-written `activate`). NOT the runtime-loader pattern — no runtime SDK *values* are needed at activation, so we avoid `runtime.ts`/`runtime-loader.ts`/`gen-package-runtime-loaders` drift. This is exactly what the `pm package init --capability schema` scaffold documents, so the exemplar matches the scaffold output (pedagogically ideal).

**Package contents:**
- Item type `Card` (folder `cards`, alias `kanban-card`) via `api.registerItemTypes`.
- Fields `wip_limit` (number), `class_of_service` (string), `blocked_reason` (string) via `api.registerItemFields` — verified none shadow BUILTIN_FIELD_KEYS.
- No-op migration `kanban-profile-init` via `api.registerMigration` (demonstrates schema evolution).
- Manifest: `capabilities:["schema"]`, **OMIT `activation.commands`** (global schema types must load under the conservative tier so `pm create Card` works), `sandbox_profile:"strict"`, all permissions false.
- Exported `kanbanProfile: ProjectProfileDefinition` = complete archetype spec (types/statuses[`doing`,`verifying`]/fields/Card workflow/config[bm25,max=30]/`card` template/package recs) — dogfoods `defineProjectProfile`/`planProfileApplication`.

**"Applies the profile" semantics:** install → schema (Card+fields) live globally → `pm create Card` creates sample items. The non-schema dimensions (statuses/config/templates) are the profile spec a consumer stages via `pm profile`-style apply; README documents this and the test exercises `planProfileApplication(kanbanProfile, …)`.

**Files added:** `packages/pm-kanban/{package.json,README.md,extensions/kanban/{index.ts,manifest.json}}`, `tests/unit/packages/kanban-extension.spec.ts` (100% coverage of index.ts via `createExtensionTestHarness` + `assertRegisteredItemType/Field/Migration` + `runRegisteredMigrationForTest` + `planProfileApplication`).

**Files updated:** `tests/unit/packages/package-manifest.spec.ts` (3 hardcoded package lists + docs/examples loop), `docs/EXTENSIONS.md` (both bundled-package lists), `docs/SDK.md` (profile-package reference), `scripts/dogfood-package-first.mjs` (add `kanban` to the catalog-alias assertion loop).

**Verification:** repo `pnpm typecheck` + 100/100/100/100 coverage + docstring gate; manual temp-dir dogfood (`pm install packages/pm-kanban`, `pm package doctor`, `pm schema list`, `pm create Card`, `pm profile`-style staging).

## Correction (claude-code-agent, 2026-06-25)

The third flow field shipped as **`impediment`** (string), NOT `blocked_reason` as stated in the implementation-plan note above. `blocked_reason` is a reserved item-metadata key (FRONT_MATTER_KEY_ORDER), so `pm create --type Card` rejected it during the dogfood; renamed to the Kanban-domain term `impediment`. Final fields: `wip_limit` (number), `class_of_service` (string), `impediment` (string).

Shipped in PR #367 (squash 98324629). First-party @unbrained/pm-kanban archetype package: registers the live Card schema (type + wip_limit/class_of_service/impediment fields) via the public registration API and exports kanbanProfile (a complete ProjectProfileDefinition the SDK planner stages) — public SDK primitives only. Catalog/describe/doctor clean; temp-dir dogfood installs the package, scaffolds the cards/ folder, and creates Card items with green health. Closes the last open child of epic pm-ugqx.

Shipped @unbrained/pm-kanban (PR #367, squash 98324629): an installable Kanban continuous-flow archetype built on public SDK primitives — live Card schema via registerItemTypes/registerItemFields plus an exported kanbanProfile ProjectProfileDefinition the SDK planner stages. Closes epic pm-ugqx's last open child.
